## Vision
pm is a universal, agent-optimized, git-native project management CLI that ships PM primitives via an SDK so any project can fully customize and optimize it. Guiding principle: **project management = context management** — an agent must be able to rebuild full working context from the pm CLI alone.

This milestone groups the post-v0.1 capability epics and their open backlog (surfaced by the 2026-05-31 ecosystem audit pm-w7f2; last reconciled by audit #4 pm-osea on 2026-07-04). PRD post-v0.1 roadmap items (advanced search tuning, adapter optimization, sandbox API surface) live under the relevant capability epic as concrete, dedup-checked work.

## Living capability epics (index)
Each is a permanently-open living backlog; new work in that area lands there. Scope In/Out boundaries are stated in each epic charter so no two overlap.

- pm-mpbb — CLI command surface & agent ergonomics
- pm-o2kc — Storage, history & data durability
- pm-ydp6 — Search & semantic retrieval
- pm-ugqx — Extension & package platform maturity (incl. SDK, plugins)
- pm-33cw — Governance, validation & data quality
- pm-dj98 — Concurrency & multi-agent safety
- pm-5oj5 — Observability, telemetry & health
- pm-8jdc — Schema, config & universal customization (incl. profiles)
- pm-5k4v — MCP server & contract platform
- pm-92if — CodeFactor / source-code quality (A→A+)
- pm-u9d0 — Docs, onboarding, release & CI
- pm-m2u1 — Architecture Decision Records (living decision log)

## Convention
Capability epics stay OPEN even with zero open children (living backlogs). Audits are CREATE-ONLY on closed items (changelog buckets by updated_at). Every pm validate/health warning maps to exactly one open remediation item.

Live tracker after organization: 1652 items, 1660 history streams, 25330 history entries; status distribution 174 open, 0 in_progress, 0 blocked, 1466 closed, 12 canceled. Ran pm context/list-open/list-in-progress/list --status all/stats/aggregate/validate/health/next/contracts, plus GH issue coverage loop. Structural checks: zero active duplicate titles, zero open unparented items, zero open AC/estimate gaps by pm list filters, zero custom open description/risk/confidence gaps after backfilling 11 descriptions. validate lifecycle/stale blockers/cycles ok; health summary ok with 0 warnings; validate resolution warning remains known historical terminal metadata debt (269 rows) mapped to pm-e9zh. GitHub coverage: all 26 open GitHub issues GH-435..474 map to pm items; GH-455 is already fixed under pm-aems with open triage pm-hq0r for GitHub closure. New non-duplicate item filed: pm-kexu for update-many --dry-run filter-only preview support. No new broad audit umbrella was created; canonical roadmap remains this milestone with pm-n7rr, pm-usfg, pm-9rxu, pm-8ngt/pm-xtrd, and composability items pm-m9xv/pm-646c/pm-psy1.

## Vision
pm is a universal, agent-optimized, git-native project management CLI that ships PM primitives via an SDK so any project can fully customize and optimize it. Guiding principle: **project management = context management** — an agent must be able to rebuild full working context from the pm CLI alone.

This milestone groups the post-v0.1 capability epics and their open backlog (surfaced by the 2026-05-31 ecosystem audit pm-w7f2; last reconciled by audit #4 pm-osea on 2026-07-04). PRD post-v0.1 roadmap items (advanced search tuning, adapter optimization, sandbox API surface) live under the relevant capability epic as concrete, dedup-checked work.

## Living capability epics (index)
Each is a permanently-open living backlog; new work in that area lands there. Scope In/Out boundaries are stated in each epic charter so no two overlap.

- pm-mpbb — CLI command surface & agent ergonomics
- pm-o2kc — Storage, history & data durability
- pm-ydp6 — Search & semantic retrieval
- pm-ugqx — Extension & package platform maturity (incl. SDK, plugins)
- pm-33cw — Governance, validation & data quality
- pm-dj98 — Concurrency & multi-agent safety
- pm-5oj5 — Observability, telemetry & health
- pm-8jdc — Schema, config & universal customization (incl. profiles)
- pm-5k4v — MCP server & contract platform
- pm-92if — CodeFactor / source-code quality (A→A+)
- pm-u9d0 — Docs, onboarding, release & CI
- pm-m2u1 — Architecture Decision Records (living decision log)

## Convention
Capability epics stay OPEN even with zero open children (living backlogs). Audits are CREATE-ONLY on closed items (changelog buckets by updated_at). Every pm validate/health warning maps to exactly one open remediation item.

## Update 2026-07-05 — strategic initiatives
Two cross-cutting initiative epics created (parented under their capability epics, indexed here for discoverability):
- **pm-n7rr** (under pm-mpbb) — CLI surface simplification: noun-verb grammar, ~15 top-level nouns, zero feature loss, alias-preserving deprecation. ADR pm-pbyu.
- **pm-usfg** (under pm-ugqx) — SDK-first architecture: the pm SDK becomes the single public API delivering all universal PM primitives; CLI/MCP are presentation layers. ADR pm-muhw.
These deliver this milestone's stated objective directly: a universal, fully-customizable PM tool whose baseline primitives ship via the pm SDK.

## Update 2026-07-06 (audit #13) — index completion + long-term horizons
Capability-epic index addition (created by audit #12, indexed here now):
- pm-qwoy — Security & code scanning (scanner-import batches + per-finding issues)

Third strategic initiative:
- **pm-9rxu** (under pm-o2kc) — Scale-out: sub-second, bounded-token context at 100k-1M items with thousands of concurrent agents. ADR pm-bl8x. Children: pm-mi2x benchmark harness (do first), pm-801d persistent read index, pm-dfg0 cursor pagination, pm-0qg5 directory fan-out, pm-lvyd claim throughput, pm-o79o history/git growth policy, pm-g2zz agent story.

Composability contract set (under pm-mpbb, delivers the stated grep/jq/xargs product principle): pm-m9xv story, pm-646c NDJSON output mode, pm-psy1 scripting contract.

Horizon ordering of the initiatives (long-term plan):
1. Near: pm-n7rr CLI simplification + pm-usfg SDK-first (mutually reinforcing; ADRs pm-pbyu/pm-muhw first, then pm-a22j/pm-lodl baselines).
2. Mid: composability contract set + pm-qwoy zero-open-findings + governance/docs debt burn-down.
3. Long: pm-9rxu scale-out (ADR pm-bl8x may be accepted earlier; implementation follows the SDK-first primitive layer so index/pagination land in the SDK, not as CLI forks).

## Update 2026-07-06 (audit #15) — horizon 4 + coverage completions

Backlog coverage completions (audit #15):

- pm-pee5 (under pm-ugqx) — EXTEND pm-brief with flow metrics (cycle/lead time, throughput, aging WIP) from history streams, on SDK read primitives. Horizon: mid.
